recommendations.title: Buy Cleveland Cavaliers to win
recommendations.reason: Recommendation: buy Cleveland Cavaliers on the moneyline. This is the strongest baseline side available in a matchup that does not land inside the tighter model windows for spreads or short favorites. The price is not ideal, but the market still shows them as the more stable side to back if you want exposure to this game.
